transcript:
CALLER: Haan, mere liye rheumatology appointment chahiye. Joint pain hai mujhe kaafi time se.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur contact number?
CALLER: Padmavathi Rao. 9700112233.
AGENT: Shukriya Padmavathi ji. Humare rheumatologist Dr. Sanjay Wadekar hain. Woh har Somvaar aur Guruwar ko clinic mein hote hain. Kab aana chahenge?
CALLER: Guruwar theek hai. Dopahar ke baad koi slot hai?
AGENT: Guruwar 3 PM aur 4:30 PM available hai.
CALLER: 3 baje book kar dijiye.
AGENT: Ho gaya! Padmavathi Rao, Guruwar 3:00 PM, Dr. Sanjay Wadekar. SMS confirm hoga. Theek ho jaiye jaldi!
